title: GitLab Knowledge Graph Ontology Schema
description: Schema for validating ontology YAML files used by the Knowledge Graph ETL pipeline.

propertyType.description: Data type for a property field.

etlScope.description: ETL processing scope - global processes all records, namespaced processes per-namespace.

edgeDirection.description: Direction of the edge relationship from the current node's perspective.

enumValues.description: Mapping of integer values to string labels for enum types.

enumType.description: How the enum is stored in the source: 'int' (integer mapped to labels, requires CASE transformation) or 'string' (already a string, pass-through).

virtualSourceDefinition.description: Configuration for a field resolved from a remote service at query time.

disabled.description: When true, the virtual field is declared but not resolvable. Queries requesting it will receive null.

depends_on.description: Column-backed properties this virtual field needs in the property map for resolution. The compiler ensures these are fetched during hydration even if the user didn't request them.

allowed_ops.description: Filter operators allowed on this virtual column. Applied in-memory after hydration. Defaults to [eq, contains, starts_with, ends_with, is_null, is_not_null] when omitted.

propertyDefinition.description: Definition of a node property/field. Exactly one of 'source' (column-backed) or 'virtual' (remote-resolved) must be present.

source.description: Source column name in the database table.

nullable.description: Whether this field can be null.

values.description: For enum types, maps integer values to string labels.

enum_type.description: For enum types, specifies how the enum is stored in the source database.

like_allowed.description: Whether LIKE-based operators (contains, starts_with, ends_with) are permitted on this field. Defaults to true. Set to false for sensitive columns to prevent probing.

filterable.description: Whether users can filter on this field. Defaults to true. Set to false for internal columns (e.g. traversal_path) that should only be system-controlled.

admin_only.description: Whether this field is only visible to instance administrators. Defaults to false. When true, non-admin users cannot select or filter on this field.

selectivity.description: Filter selectivity hint for the query planner. 'low' = few distinct values (enums, booleans), 'high' = many distinct values. Auto-derived from type when omitted.

traversal_path_lookup.description: Marks this column as a scoping key the path resolver maps to a traversal_path leaf.

oneOf.description: Virtual property resolved from a remote service at query time.

nullable.description: Whether this field can be null.

traversalPathLookup.description: Path-resolution annotation for a scoping column: how to map an id/full_path filter to a traversal_path leaf.

kind.description: Whether this column resolves by entity id or by full_path.

dictionary.description: Auxiliary dictionary to probe (id kind). Absent for argMax-only resolution (full_path).

source_table.description: Unprefixed destination_table of the owning node.

key_column.description: Column the dictionary or scan keys on.

edgeMappingDefinition.description: Configuration for generating edges during ETL.

to_column.description: Column containing the target node type (for polymorphic edges).

type_mapping.description: Maps raw column values to ontology node types (e.g., Issue -> WorkItem). Only valid with `to_column`.

as.description: Relationship kind name for the generated edge.

direction.description: Edge direction from this node's perspective.

array_field.description: When a datalake column is typed Array(Tuple(...)), names the tuple element holding the foreign key ID (e.g. 'user_id'). The indexer will ARRAY JOIN the column and extract one edge per element.

array.description: When true, indicates the column is a flat array (e.g. Array(UInt64)). The indexer will unnest the array and create one edge per element.

mutable.description: Set when the FK can change over the entity's lifetime (a 'latest'/'current' pointer); such edges are reconciled by the stale-edge sweep. Immutable FKs leave this false.

etlConfig.description: ETL configuration for indexing this entity from source tables.

oneOf.description: Table ETL: simple extraction from a single source table.

watermark.description: Column name for incremental processing watermark.

order_by.description: Columns for ORDER BY in extract queries. Defaults to the node's sort_key if not specified.

transform.description: Name of the transform that consumes this extract. Absent means the built-in data_fusion projection; a name (e.g. system_notes) resolves a registered transform in the indexer.

edges.description: Edge generation config keyed by source column name. Each value may be a single edge mapping or a list of mappings when one column emits multiple edges (for example an outgoing FK plus its inverse).

oneOf.description: Query ETL: structured extraction with JOINs and custom conditions.

select.description: Column expressions for the SELECT clause.

from.description: Table or JOIN expression for the FROM clause.

where.description: Extra WHERE conditions beyond watermark and traversal_path filtering (e.g. business logic filters).

watermark.description: Column name for incremental processing watermark.

order_by.description: Columns for ORDER BY in extract queries. Defaults to the node's sort_key if not specified.

traversal_path_filter.description: Custom traversal_path filter expression for namespace scoping. When set, replaces the default startsWith(traversal_path, ...) filter. Must contain {traversal_path:String} placeholder.

table_alias.description: Alias of the main table in the from clause. Required when from contains JOINs so that bare column references (e.g. id) can be qualified to avoid ambiguity.

page_join.description: Secondary table joined after the page LIMIT to avoid materializing the full secondary table in ClickHouse's hash-join build phase. The lowering wraps the base query in a _batch CTE and enriches via fk_column IN (SELECT id FROM _batch).

alias.description: Table alias used in the enrichment CTE (e.g. snm).

fk_column.description: FK column on the joined table that references the base table's id (e.g. note_id).

select.description: Columns to select from the joined table (e.g. [action]).

where.description: Extra WHERE predicate on the joined table (e.g. _siphon_deleted = false).

watermark.description: Watermark column for argMax deduplication. Defaults to _siphon_replicated_at.

traversal_path_column.description: traversal_path column on the joined table. When set and the entity is namespaced, the enrichment CTE adds startsWith(<col>, {traversal_path}) so the join prunes by the joined table's leading PK column instead of scanning its whole FK index. The IN (SELECT id FROM _batch) bound already guarantees correctness; this is a pruning hint that must be a superset of the matched rows.

transform.description: Name of the transform that consumes this extract. Absent means the built-in data_fusion projection; a name (e.g. system_notes) resolves a registered transform in the indexer.

edges.description: Edge generation config keyed by source column name. Each value may be a single edge mapping or a list of mappings when one column emits multiple edges.

redactionConfig.description: Redaction configuration for access control. Defines how query results for this entity are validated against Rails' RedactionService to filter out entities the user cannot access. When a node has redaction config, the query engine includes id/type columns in results, and gkg-server validates these against the user's permissions before returning data.

resource_type.description: Rails resource type identifier used by RedactionService (e.g., 'projects', 'merge_requests', 'groups', 'users'). Maps to keys in Authz::RedactionService::RESOURCE_CLASSES.

id_column.description: Column containing the entity ID for redaction lookups. Defaults to 'id'.

ability.description: Rails ability to check (e.g., 'read_project'). If not specified, uses the default ability for the resource type.

required_role.description: Minimum GitLab role a user must hold on a traversal path for this entity's rows to be visible. Applied by the compiler security pass: traversal paths where the user holds a lower role are dropped from the startsWith() predicate for this entity's table, closing the aggregation-query bypass where target nodes (e.g. Vulnerability) were never redacted. Defaults to 'reporter' for entities that do not opt in.

styleConfig.description: Visual styling configuration for graph visualization.

size.description: Node size in pixels for visualization (16-64).

color.description: Hex color code for the node (e.g., '#3B82F6').

table_prefix.description: Prefix applied to all ClickHouse graph table names (e.g., 'gl_').

default_edge_table.description: Default ClickHouse edge table name. Must be a key in edge_tables.

default_entity_sort_key.description: Default ClickHouse ORDER BY columns for node tables. Individual nodes inherit this unless they override with their own sort_key.

edge_tables.description: Edge table definitions keyed by table name. Each defines sort_key and columns.

sort_key.description: ClickHouse ORDER BY columns for this edge table.

columns.description: Column definitions for this edge table, in schema order.

storage.description: ClickHouse DDL storage metadata for the edge table.

denormalization.description: Node properties to denormalize onto all edge tables. The loader auto-derives which edges need each property based on edge variants.

property.description: Property name on the node (e.g. status).

as.description: Edge column suffix. Defaults to property name. Full column is {direction}_{as}.

statistics.description: Automated column statistics collection via AggregatingMergeTree MVs. All filterable properties on all entities are auto-tracked. Categorization is derived from property types: boolean/enum/selectivity:low → stats_table (value frequencies), string → token_table (token frequencies), int64/timestamp/date/float → histogram_table (equi-depth buckets), uuid → skipped.

stats_table.description: AggregatingMergeTree table for per-value frequency stats (categorical columns).

histogram_table.description: AggregatingMergeTree table for equi-depth histogram bucket states (continuous/numerical columns).

token_table.description: AggregatingMergeTree table for token frequency states (text columns).

dictionary.description: ClickHouse dictionary for fast stats lookups at query time.

histogram_buckets.description: Number of equi-depth histogram buckets for continuous/numerical columns.

top_k_tokens.description: Number of top-K tokens to track per token column.

partition_key.description: Column used to partition stats by namespace. Entities without this column get global stats (empty partition key).

exclude.description: Columns to exclude from statistics collection.

internal_column_prefix.description: Prefix for internal columns injected by the compiler (e.g. '_gkg_'). Ontology field names starting with this prefix are rejected at load time.

skip_security_filter_for_entities.description: Entity names (e.g. 'User') excluded from traversal-path security filters. Resolved to physical table names at load time. These are entities whose visibility is determined through relationships rather than direct path hierarchy.

local_db.description: Configuration for entities that participate in the local DuckDB graph (CLI indexing).

name.description: Entity name (must reference a declared node).

exclude_properties.description: Property names excluded from the local table for this entity (e.g. server-only columns like 'traversal_path').

entities.description: Entities indexed locally, with per-entity property exclusions.

edge_table.description: Edge table schema for the local DuckDB graph.

name.description: Table name for the local edge table.

columns.description: Columns in the local edge table, in order.

materialized_views.description: ClickHouse materialized views created after all graph tables. Views act as insert triggers that transform incoming data and write to a destination table or implicit storage. Each view must use exactly one storage mode: either to_table (TO-table mode) or engine (implicit-storage mode).

name.description: Materialized view name. Receives the schema-version prefix during migration.

to_table.description: Target table for the TO clause. The table must be an ontology-tracked table (auxiliary, node, or edge) so it is created and dropped alongside other graph tables during schema migration. Receives the schema-version prefix during migration.

select_query.description: The SELECT query for the view body. Table references use {table_name} placeholder syntax so that schema-version prefixes are resolved at DDL generation time.

engine.description: Engine name for implicit storage (e.g. AggregatingMergeTree, SummingMergeTree). Required when to_table is not set.

order_by.description: ORDER BY columns for implicit storage. Ignored when to_table is set.

populate.description: When true, emit POPULATE to backfill the view with existing data on creation. Defaults to false.

oneOf.description: TO-table mode: the view writes into a pre-existing ontology-tracked table.
Implicit-storage mode: ClickHouse creates backing storage with the given engine.

auxiliary_dictionaries.description: ClickHouse dictionaries over node tables (e.g. traversal_path resolution). ClickHouse-only; skipped for DuckDB local.

etl.description: Default ETL settings for watermark, deleted, and edge order_by columns.

etlSettingsDefinition.description: Default ETL settings applied when node/edge YAML omits watermark, deleted, or order_by.

default_watermark.description: Default column name for incremental processing watermark.

default_deleted.description: Default column name indicating soft-deleted records.

default_etl_order_by.description: Default ORDER BY columns for node ETL extract queries.

nodes.description: Map of node names to their YAML file paths.

derived.description: Map of edge-producing derived-entity names to their YAML file paths.

mainSchema.description: Main schema.yaml file that references all nodes and edges.

type.description: Discriminator identifying this as the main schema file.

edges.description: Map of edge names to their YAML file paths.

label.description: Property name to use as the display label for this node type.

destination_table.description: ClickHouse table name for storing this entity.

default_columns.description: Columns returned by default when this node appears in dynamic query results (e.g., path finding, neighbors). If omitted, all columns are returned.

sort_key.description: ClickHouse ORDER BY columns for this node's destination table. Used as the deduplication key for ReplacingMergeTree.

redaction.description: Redaction configuration for access control. Set to null if not yet configured.

storage.description: ClickHouse DDL storage metadata. Columns, indexes, projections, and engine settings for DDL generation.

edgeNodeReference.description: Reference to a node in an edge variant.

id.description: ID field name on the node.

edgeVariantScope.description: How a resolved traversal_path prefix relates to an edge variant's endpoints. 'namespace_anchor': source FK points to a Project/Group anchor; propagates and enables anchor FK resolution. 'same_namespace': both endpoints share a namespace subtree; prefix propagates across the edge. 'prune_to_source'/'prune_to_target': confine the edge's own scan to the named endpoint's namespace WITHOUT propagating, so the other endpoint may be a global hub (User/Runner/Label) — the named endpoint must be path-scopable. Omitted (default): fail-closed, no scoping or propagation.

edgeVariant.description: A specific source-target pair for an edge relationship.

fk_column.description: Foreign key column on one of the two node tables that encodes this relationship (e.g. 'project_id', 'author_id'). The loader resolves which node has the column. When present, the compiler can join node tables directly instead of scanning the edge table.

scope.description: Namespace scope relationship between endpoints. See edgeVariantScope for values.

description.description: Human-readable description of this edge variant.

edgeEtlEndpoint.description: Configuration for an edge endpoint in ETL.

type_column.description: Column containing the node type (for polymorphic edges).

type_mapping.description: Maps raw column values to entity types (e.g., Namespace -> Group).

enrich.description: Columns to enrich from this endpoint's node datalake table via LEFT JOIN. Makes node properties available for denormalization onto edge rows.

edgeEtlConfig.description: ETL configuration for edges sourced from join tables.

order_by.description: Columns for ORDER BY in extract queries and cursor-based pagination.

table.description: Optional ClickHouse table for this edge type. Must be a key in settings.edge_tables. Defaults to settings.default_edge_table.

properties.description: Property definitions for this edge (for edges with additional data).

variants.description: List of valid source-target node type pairs.

derivedSchema.description: Edge-producing derived entity. The extract (with `transform: rust`) is declared in `etl`; the registered Rust transform parses and emits edges. Produces no node table.

name.description: Entity kind. Must match the key under a domain's `derived`.

description.description: Human-readable description of the derived entity.

emits.description: Edge relationship kinds this entity is expected to emit (informational).

nodeStorage.description: ClickHouse DDL storage metadata for a node table.

version_only_engine.description: When true, engine is ReplacingMergeTree(_version) without _deleted.

primary_key.description: PRIMARY KEY columns. When absent, ClickHouse defaults to ORDER BY.

columns.description: Columns in exact DDL order (excluding _version and _deleted).

tableSettings.description: ClickHouse MergeTree table settings emitted in the CREATE TABLE SETTINGS clause.

storageColumn.description: A column as it appears in CREATE TABLE DDL.

name.description: Column name. Lowercase with underscores. Backtick-quoted for reserved words.

type.description: Exact ClickHouse type. Must start with a known type name.

default.description: DEFAULT expression. Only literals, function calls, and quoted strings allowed.

items.description: Codec. Must be ZSTD(N), Delta(N), or LZ4.

name.description: Index name. Must start with idx_.

type.description: Index type. Must be minmax, set(N), bloom_filter(N.NN), text(tokenizer = ...), ngrambf_v1(n, size, hashes, seed), or tokenbf_v1(size, hashes, seed).

items.description: SELECT expression. Column names and aggregate functions only.

versioned_sort_key.description: Prefix columns for a dedup-compatible lightweight projection. The table sort key and _version are appended automatically.
